title: No Silk Touch Ender Chest
description: Get your ender chest back without Silk Touch.
body:
**Modrinth was recently sold to Spark Universe, creators of the Essential Mod.**
If this sale negatively affects the experience of Modrinth users, I will be pulling this mod from the platform.

This datapack allows you to get your Ender Chest back with **any** pickaxe, without the need for Silk Touch!

Add the **Data Pack** to **specific worlds**, or install the **mod** to apply to **all of your worlds.**

No other mods are required.
How to install a Data Pack: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1qdQVeYkgpA
 
Works by modifying the loot tables for the Ender Chest block.
I do not currently plan on updating this past 1.21. Feel free to try it out on newer versions anyway.

Not tested as a server side mod.
